deep_dive.title: A 65 nm Multi-Modal Bayesian Inference Engine with 16.3 fJ/Sample Calibration-Free GRNG for Risk-Aware At-Home Skin Lesion Screening
deep_dive.abstract: We present a 65-nm risk-aware multimodal Bayesian inference engine for privacy-preserving, fully on-device skin lesion screening under uncontrolled at-home conditions. The proposed compute-in-memory architecture performs in-word Mixture-of-Gaussian sampling, improving uncertainty modeling beyond conventional unimodal Bayesian neural networks. This added probabilistic expressiveness increases equal-risk operating coverage by 1.4x, improves robustness to user-data perturbations by >1.5x, enhances process-variation resilience by 5.5x, and improves balanced accuracy by 1.8% over state-of-the-art unimodal Bayesian neural networks. Hardware robustness is further supported by calibration-free Gaussian random-number generation using complementary process variation, achieving 16.3 fJ/sample and 168.6 GSa/s/mm^2 efficiency. These results demonstrate a practical, energy-efficient, and risk-aware edge-AI solution for privacy-conscious medical screening.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 直接采用存内计算架构
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 直接采用存内计算架构
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 直接采用存内计算架构
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: A 65nm compute-in-memory Bayesian inference chip for skin lesion screening uses in-word Mixture-of-Gaussian sampling to improve uncertainty modeling, achieving 1.4x coverage, 5.5x resilience, and 1.8% accuracy gain over unimodal BNNs.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出一款65纳米存内计算贝叶斯推理芯片，用于隐私保护的家庭皮肤病变筛查。该芯片采用词内混合高斯采样，相比传统单峰贝叶斯神经网络，将等风险操作覆盖率提升1.4倍，对用户数据扰动的鲁棒性提升1.5倍以上，工艺变化抗性提高5.5倍，平衡精度提升1.8%。硬件鲁棒性进一步由免校准高斯随机数生成器支持。这项工作展示了存内计算架构在不确定性建模和能效方面的优势。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文提出一款65纳米存内计算贝叶斯推理芯片，用于隐私保护的家庭皮肤病变筛查。该芯片采用词内混合高斯采样，相比传统单峰贝叶斯神经网络，将等风险操作覆盖率提升1.4倍，对用户数据扰动的鲁棒性提升1.5倍以上，工艺变化抗性提高5.5倍，平衡精度提升1.8%。硬件鲁棒性进一步由免校准高斯随机数生成器支持。这项工作展示了存内计算架构在不确定性建模和能效方面的优势。
